newsSinceJun6: No material company-specific news since June 6. Today's +6.19% (to 944,000 KRW) is a flow-driven rebound from the -6.5% sell-off on June 8 (956,000 -> 889,000 KRW): a two-day round trip that nets roughly flat, with no new orders, guidance, or capacity announcements. Sector backdrop is unchanged from early May: record ~KRW 32T combined order backlog across Korea's big-three power equipment makers on AI data center demand, 'emperor stock' press coverage, and a 300%+ one-year run for HD Hyundai Electric - crowding evidence, not fresh fundamentals.

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at 48: today's +6.2% merely retraces yesterday's -6.5% with zero new fundamental evidence, and on a hidden-alpha list this name is already correctly penalized - it is a widely-covered 'emperor stock' AI power trade, the opposite of under-owned, and its distance from the passives bottleneck stack is unchanged.
verdicts.bull: Record ~KRW 32T sector order backlog and multi-year sold-out large-transformer capacity give real earnings visibility through 2028; consensus targets sit ~47% above the current price, so even a crowded name can keep compounding if US grid and AI data center orders accelerate.
verdicts.neutral: The grid-transformer thesis is intact but fully discovered: a +6%/-6% two-day round trip on no news is the signature of a momentum-crowded trade chopping sideways, leaving rank 48 in the monitor bucket appropriate.
verdicts.bear: 300%+ one-year rerating, heavy retail/passive ownership and saturated press coverage mean residual alpha is thin; any AI capex digestion, US tariff action on Korean transformers, or competitor capacity additions could unwind the multiple far faster than backlog converts to earnings.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New large US/Middle East transformer order wins or Q2 earnings showing backlog-to-revenue conversion and margin expansion.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding unwind in the Korean AI-power complex - high-velocity de-rating on AI capex digestion or tariff/regulatory shocks, independent of fundamentals.
